LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHEAL THOMPSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. THE SOLE BASIS FOR PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION IS THAT DEFENDANTS DID NOT SUBMIT A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING, YET THE COURT HAS RECEIVED A PROPOSED ANSWER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MICHEAL THOMPSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS Granted. The sole basis for plaintiff's opposition is that defendants did not submit a proposed responsive pleading, yet the court has received a proposed answer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =302/HK
